name: Sahiwal Cow
description: Famous for strong body, ভালো মাংস quality, and ideal for Qurbani.

name: Brahman Cow
description: Large size and খুবই শক্তিশালী breed, perfect for big Qurbani.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: Very popular goat breed, known for tasty meat and small size.

name: Garole Sheep
description: Small-sized sheep, ভালো মানের মাংস and suitable for small Qurbani.
